_meta.stability: Frozen for the weft-generation lifetime per ADR-002.
_meta.relation_to_classic: Classic GET /api/search returns {results, total}. Weft wraps in ListResponse[IssueWeft] and DROPS total per the strict envelope; consumers needing a count hit /api/stats. Classic stays unchanged.

shape_decl.request_type: GET; query params q (search text), limit (default 50), offset (default 0)
shape_decl.rationale: Empty q returns {items: [], has_more: false}. Weft items are full IssueWeft (matches classic's /search which also returns full IssueDicts in 'results').

examples.name: empty_query
examples.note: Empty q short-circuits to the empty list response.
